job_title: Field Service Engr II- HVAC & lighting Automation Controls
job_description:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• You will use your experience and judgment to plan and accomplish goals, as well as generate innovative solutions by applying creative and effective approaches to complex problems and opportunities.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• Develops infrastructure solutions based on customer requirements and documents technical knowledge through notes and procedures.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• It requires collaboration with certification engineers to ensure product compliance with current standards.
• Key responsibilities include addressing product quality and manufacturing issues through root-cause analysis, leading customer discussions to define requirements, mentoring junior engineers, and improving work practices and processes.
• Sr Advanced Software Engineer - (DevOps, SRE & AI) Locations Atlanta, GA, United States (Hybrid) Posting Date03/09/2026 Trending We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) to join our team.
